title: CK Migration Metadata
description: Schema for CK model migration metadata files that list available migrations from previous versions

$schema.description: The URI of the schema for the migration metadata file

ckModelId.description: The CK model ID this migration metadata belongs to (e.g., 'System-2.0.0')

migrations.description: List of available migrations from previous versions

CkMigrationMeta.description: CK migration metadata for use in compiled CK models

ckModelId.description: The CK model ID this migration metadata belongs to

CkMigrationReference.description: Reference to a migration script within a CK model

fromVersion.description: Source version this migration applies from

toVersion.description: Target version this migration upgrades to

scriptPath.description: Path to the migration script file (relative to the migrations folder)

description.description: Description of what this migration does

breaking.description: Whether this migration contains breaking changes
